channel.title: Apple on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Apple on Arrans github.io

item.title: rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI
item.description: Fast, scriptable CLI for the App Store Connect API. Automate TestFlight, builds, submissions, signing, analytics, screenshots, subscriptions, and more. JSON-first, no interactive prompts

item.title: jsattler/BetterCapture
item.description: The macOS screen recorder for the rest of us - always free and open source with a native look and feel 📺

item.title: Syllo/nvtop
item.description: GPU & Accelerator process monitoring for AMD, Apple, Huawei, Intel, NVIDIA and Qualcomm

item.title: luchina-gabriel/OSX-PROXMOX
item.description: Voilà, install macOS on ANY Computer! This is really and magic easiest way! PVE 7.XX ~ 8.XX Support and macOS High Sierra ~ macOS Sequoia Support.

item.title: iDescriptor/iDescriptor
item.description: A free, open-source, and cross-platform iDevice management tool

item.title: Apple-Actions/import-codesign-certs
item.description: GitHub Action for Importing Code-signing Certificates into a Keychain

item.title: Apple-Actions/download-provisioning-profiles
item.description: Github Action for downloading provisioning profiles from Apple AppStore Connect
